custom_sources.notes: Prioritize signals observable from the listed handles and competitor sites; regional landing pages are the canonical campaign references.

trends: Short-form video growth in KSA; Ramadan gifting search spike week-over-week; one competitor UGC challenge gaining traction among listed TikTok creators.
events: Regional holiday moments; competitor spring campaign teasers (see @rival_official Reels).
competitors: Competitor A increased paid social in UAE; Competitor B launched UGC challenge tied to creators on the custom_sources list.
brand_context: Focus on awareness and consideration; limited new creative until Eid wave; align messaging with ksa.brand.example campaign landing page.
feedback_last_week: Top recommendation was to test Reels hooks in UAE; early CTR +12%, conversion flat.
